'''gaduvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylographica|xylographica]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylographica|xylographica]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gaduvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædivith|gædivith]] || [[word:gædivij|gædivij]] || [[word:gædivish|gædivish]] || [[word:gædivi|gædivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gaduduvuth|gaduduvuth]] || [[word:gaduduvuj|gaduduvuj]] || [[word:gaduduvush|gaduduvush]] || [[word:gaduduvu|gaduduvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gaduvuth|gaduvuth]] || [[word:gaduvuj|gaduvuj]] || [[word:gaduvush|gaduvush]] || [[word:gaduvu|gaduvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadufvuth|gadufvuth]] || [[word:gadufvuj|gadufvuj]] || [[word:gadufvush|gadufvush]] || [[word:gadufvuf|gadufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gaduvuthu|gaduvuthu]] || [[word:gaduvuju|gaduvuju]] || [[word:gaduvushu|gaduvushu]] || [[word:gaduvuku|gaduvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gaduvuth|gaduvuth]] || [[word:gaduvuj|gaduvuj]] || [[word:gaduvush|gaduvush]] || [[word:gaduvu|gaduvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gaduvuthul|gaduvuthul]] || [[word:gaduvujul|gaduvujul]] || [[word:gaduvushul|gaduvushul]] || [[word:gaduvukul|gaduvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gaduvuthuthu|gaduvuthuthu]] || [[word:gaduvujuju|gaduvujuju]] || [[word:gaduvushushu|gaduvushushu]] || [[word:gaduvuku|gaduvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gaduvuthun|gaduvuthun]] || [[word:gaduvujun|gaduvujun]] || [[word:gaduvushun|gaduvushun]] || [[word:gaduvukun|gaduvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gaduvuthuoro|gaduvuthuoro]] || [[word:gaduvujuoro|gaduvujuoro]] || [[word:gaduvushuoro|gaduvushuoro]] || [[word:gaduvukuoro|gaduvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
